creator: mmel@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just tested it (on a fresh current) AHCI (ASM1062) on ROCKPro64 (RK3299) and everything looks OK.

This is very strange, the AHCI reset only needs access to the MMIO, nothing else.

Please post the verbose boot log somewhere.

---------------------------
